# Incidr filter (ioc ip join)

**Dataset**: `gx_03_ioc_ip` (synthetic scenario lab dataset — the technique transfers to your real datasets)

IOC enrichment — correlate live events against an indicator IP lookup via join. Incidr filter. `incidr()` tests an IP against a CIDR (literal multi-CIDR string only — not a column).

```sql
dataset = gx_03_ioc_ip | alter in_ru_range = incidr(indicator, "45.0.0.0/8, 185.220.0.0/16") | filter in_ru_range = true | fields indicator, threat, in_ru_range
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 3). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
